text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water and do ten minutes of stretching. After a quick shower, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. My work starts at 9 am, and I usually have lunch at my desk. In the afternoon, I take a 30-minute walk to clear my mind. When I finish work at 6 pm, I go for a jog in the park or do some yoga at home. In the evening, I cook dinner and read a book or watch a show before bed. This routine helps me stay healthy and focused.
